summary: Two-Way Memory-Soul Sync feature testing completed successfully. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirms the feature is working correctly - Lola's score is 44% (up from 34% before the Two-Way Sync implementation). Chat messages with extractable data are processed, soul scores are recalculated, and achievement notifications are displayed.

two_way_sync_chat.details: Chat messages with extractable data (allergies, behaviors) are processed correctly. User sent 'Lola is allergic to chicken and beef' and data was written to pet profile

soul_score_recalculation.details: Lola's score updated from 34% to 44% after chat-based data extraction. recalculate_pet_soul_score() function is called automatically after write_soul_data_to_pet()

dashboard_soul_scores.details: All 7 pets display correct soul scores in 'Your Pets' Soul Journey' grid

mojo_profile_modal.details: Pet selector dropdown shows all pets with soul scores. Profile data including allergies is accessible.

soul_form_modal.details: Enhance Soul button present on Mira Demo page. Soul Form Modal opens correctly.

achievement_notifications.details: Toast notification displayed: 'Soul Seeker - Lola has reached 25% Soul completion'

weather_card.details: Weather displayed: '28°C • Mumbai' with CAUTION warning and pet-specific advice

proactive_alerts_banner.details: Multiple alerts displayed: 'How is Lola doing?' weekly check-in, 'Senior Joint Care' health alert

paw_points_balance.details: Balance: 1790 Paw Points displayed in dashboard header

critical_code_review_comments: Two-Way Sync implementation is complete: write_soul_data_to_pet() correctly calls recalculate_pet_soul_score() at line 1128
mira_routes.py extract_soul_data_from_response() processes user messages and writes data back to pet profile (lines 11414-11455)
Score recalculation uses weighted folder scores matching pet_soul_routes.py question bank
Achievement toast notifications work correctly when score crosses thresholds
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-Way Memory-Soul Sync is fully implemented and working. Lola's score went from 34% to 44% after chat-based data extraction (food allergies extracted from conversation). The recalculate_pet_soul_score() function is called automatically after data is written to pet profile. All UI components (dashboard, mira-demo, pet selector, achievement toasts) display correct data.
